creator: ben@lavery-griffiths.com
text:
Created attachment 208506
svn diff to upgrade to 0.59.0

gohugo has been updated to 0.59.0
(https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/releases/tag/v0.59.0)

The attached svn diff brings this port up to 0.59.0

Change log:
The timing of this release is motivated by getting the copies of the docs repositories in synch, now fully "Hugo Modularized". But it also comes with many smaller changes outlined in the GitHub projects Releases page linked above.

- portlint: OK (looks fine.)
- testport: OK (poudriere: <11.3-RELEASE, 11.3-STABLE, 12.0-RELEASE, 12.0-STABLE, 12.1-PRERELEASE, and 13.0-CURRENT>, < amd64/i386 >, <manpages + with/without extended> tested)
